channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: US-Iran Conflict Escalates as Gulf States Targeted and Kharg Island Hit
item.description: Tensions in the Middle East have intensified as Iran launched a widespread missile and drone campaign against Gulf countries, surprising the United States and its allies. US President Donald Trump exp...

item.title: Several Iranian women's football players return home despite asylum offers in Australia
item.description: Several members of Iran's women's national football team, who were in Australia for the Asian Cup and had been granted humanitarian visas, have chosen to return to Iran. Initially, seven players recei...

item.title: West Asia Conflict Impacts India’s Domestic Security Measures
item.description: Former West Bengal Governor Gopalkrishna Gandhi has remarked that the ongoing conflict in West Asia is no longer distant and has tangible effects on India’s domestic life. Speaking at a panel discussi...

item.title: China's legislation promotes Putonghua at the expense of minority languages
item.description: China has recently passed a law that mandates the use of Putonghua, the national common language, across all educational and official settings, putting minority languages under increasing pressure. Hi...

item.title: Changan Deepal S07 L: A Glamorous Electric SUV with Comfort and Style
item.description: The Changan Deepal S07 L, a new all-electric vehicle from the Chinese automaker Changan, has arrived in South Africa with a focus on style and technology rather than pure practicality. Priced at R995,...

item.title: Tinubu Highlights Need for Collective Effort in Nigeria’s Development
item.description: For real, the President, Bola Tinubu, don yarn how Nigeria no fit rely only on the federal government for her development. Na during one media chat he talk say make all Nigerians, private sector, stat...

item.title: Warwick Davis reveals new partner Yvette, nicknamed 'Sponge', a year after wife's death
item.description: Actor Warwick Davis, best known for his roles in Harry Potter and Willow, has been dating a woman named Yvette for over a year following the tragic death of his wife, Samantha Davis, in March 2024. Sa...

item.title: Two men arrested in connection with the killing of three gold buyers in Cagayan
item.description: MANILA, Philippines — Police authorities have arrested two suspects in relation to the murder of three gold buyers in Lal-lo, Cagayan. Frederick Usana, 31, and Rodel Sabal, 48, were taken into custody...

item.title: Court of Appeal Suspends High Court Ruling on President's 21 Advisers
item.description: The Court of Appeal has granted President William Ruto and his 21 presidential advisers a temporary reprieve by suspending a High Court ruling that declared their positions unconstitutional. This deci...

item.title: Quebec's Local Whisky Sees Strong Sales Growth Following U.S. Import Ban
item.description: Quebec’s whisky industry has experienced a significant boost in sales since the removal of U.S. alcoholic products from SAQ shelves, following tariffs imposed by former U.S. President Donald Trump. Th...

item.title: Formula 1 events in Bahrain and Saudi Arabia called off amid Middle East conflict
item.description: The upcoming Formula 1 races scheduled in Bahrain and Saudi Arabia have been cancelled due to escalating tensions related to the ongoing conflict involving Iran. This decision was officially announced...

item.title: Daily Feng Shui Guide ni Master Hanz Cua para sa Marso 15, 2026: Lucky Tips sa Love, Health, Career at Wealth
item.description: Ang artikulo mula sa ABS-CBN Lifestyle ay naglalaman ng araw-araw na feng shui predictions ni Master Hanz Cua para sa March 15, 2026. Karaniwan sa ganitong uri ng content, binibigyan niya ng gabay ang...

item.title: Spacious Kaleen Home with Dual-Occupancy and Modern Features for Sale
item.description: Located at 10 Wakool Circuit, Kaleen, this expansive residence has been designed for modern multigenerational living. The home, which sits on an 828-square-metre block, features more than 300 square m...

item.title: Kaduna Polytechnic investigates students barred over dress code enforcement
item.description: Kaduna Polytechnic don begin investigation after some students for College of Business and Management Studies (CBMS) bin stop from entering lecture halls because of their clothes. The incident show fo...

item.title: Intensive Security Measures in Place for Oscars Ceremony Amid Safety Concerns
item.description: The 98th Academy Awards are being held under unprecedented security due to fears of potential terrorist threats linked to the Iran conflict. More than 1,000 police officers, alongside SWAT teams, snip...

item.title: Guide to Applying for University of Nairobi Master's Programs
item.description: The University of Nairobi (UoN) is one of Kenya's leading institutions and widely recognised across East Africa for quality education and diverse academic programs. For those interested in pursuing a ...

item.title: Facing Anxiety in the Ring: A Middle-Aged Mother’s Boxing Journey
item.description: Anna Spargo-Ryan, a middle-aged mother plagued by lifelong anxiety, decided to confront her fears by taking up boxing. Initially, even calling someone on the phone or going out after dark was daunting...

item.title: Ayra Starr Talks About Her Top 3 Favourite Afrobeats Artists
item.description: For recent interview for New York radio HOT 97 FM, Ayra Starr don talk about the three Afrobeats stars wey she dey admire pass. She put Tiwa Savage, Wizkid, and Rema as her 'Big 3'. This no shock anyb...

item.title: Pakistan Rejects Indian Criticism, Highlights Terrorism Sponsorship from Afghan Soil
item.description: On March 15, 2026, the Foreign Office spokesperson Tahir Andrabi strongly rejected India’s remarks on Pakistan’s counterterrorism operations in Afghanistan, calling them “absurd, unwarranted and shame...

item.title: Government Confirms Sufficient Fertiliser Supplies for Kharif Season Despite Global Supply Risks
item.description: The Indian government has assured that there will be sufficient fertiliser stocks for the upcoming kharif, or summer-sown, cropping season. Union Information and Broadcasting Minister Ashwini Vaishnaw...
